name: Fudgy Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt the margarine or butter.
3. Stir in the sweetened condensed milk and hot water until smooth.
4. Remove from heat; stir in the remaining ingredients (chocolate, eggs, vanilla extract, salt).
5. Pour into prepared pie crust.
6. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until the center is set. Cool slightly.
7. Serve warm or chilled. Garnish with whipped cream or ice cream if desired.
8. Refrigerate leftovers.
You can also use premelted chocolate called "chocolate bake" instead of unsweetened squares.
